blocks.content: Ikael smiled.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: I will trust you. You will not feel any doubt.
It was fortunate that Shirone was a quick-witted boy.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: That's the spirit. Now, let's begin.
Ikael closed her eyes and cast Possession.
As her Holy Light Body penetrated Shirone's mind, his eyes widened.
A strange feeling of two minds merging was felt as flashes of light emitted from the eyes.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Shirone, how are you feeling?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: H- Huh? This is….
Shirone, who experienced Possession for the first time, was bewildered.
He couldn't tell whether the thoughts that were coming into his head were his own or Ikael's.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It felt like he was playing the role of two people alone, like a madman.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Don't be confused. I am Shirone, and Shirone is me. Just think your thoughts.
He understood the concept, but even the thoughts that came to mind felt like his own delusions, giving him chills.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Did he really need to think that? It seemed like he could think of something else if he wanted to.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Don't doubt! If you start doubting, everything that makes up Shirone will fall apart. Possession is a delicate magic. Just accept it.
Shirone decided to just believe it.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even if the thoughts in his mind were merely delusions, he concluded they were the truth.
As his mind became more at ease, his heartbeat began to stabilize.
Despite the initial confusion, they hadn't even started the angel's magic circle yet.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - I'm going to create Holy Light Body now. Extract your spirit outside.
Shirone transformed his Spirit Zone into a Deviate Type.
While an angel's halo is above the head, Shirone projected his Spirit Zone forward.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Is this okay?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. No, you did well. Whatever you do, Shirone's decision is important. You must find the most efficient method yourself. Now, we will create the halo that forms the framework of the magic circle. Draw a perfect circle with light.
Shirone waited without thinking about anything.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: - Um… Should I do it now?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Yes. Do it now.
Shirone, who had thought that she would give some advice, was embarrassed.
However, he thought that there must be a reason for that, and expanded the light into a ring shape.
A one-meter-diameter halo appeared in front of Shirone.
At first glance, it looked quite impressive.
It was a neat circle and the brightness was appropriate.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - It's woefully inadequate. A circle this distorted cannot compute a huge amount of information.
As expected, Ikael's critique was heard.
When examined at a level undetectable by the human eye, it was a mess.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He couldn't find a way.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The concept of a perfect circle was just that, a concept.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How could he implement something that didn't exist anywhere in the world?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - A perfect circle?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone suddenly realized.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There was one thing, the only perfect circle that existed in this world.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - That's right, Shirone. It's the Immortal Function. That's why the Nephilim are called the descendants of angels.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: -But if that happens….

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His existence will disappear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hadn't he already experienced this in Miro's space-time?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - You have to activate Immortal Function 100%. Then, grasp it again and manifest it into form. I'll control it, but it's definitely a dangerous task. Can you do it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: - I'll try. Now that I've done it once, the second will be easy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Actually, he didn't think it would be easy at all.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But it felt like he would go crazy from the tension if he didn't say even a little nonsense.
Shirone opened Immortal Function.
There was no brake, no hesitation in its release.
As his mind disintegrated, it spread out infinitely.
Shirone's mind became Akashic Record.
However, since it was already perfect in itself, no information could be obtained.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Shirone! Shirone! Listen to my voice! You must not let go of yourself! Etch this sensation into your mind! Pull yourself together with Indestructible Vajra!
Shirone pulled his mind, which had disintegrated into the smallest units, back within the boundaries of Indestructible Vajra.
A huge ring of light swept into Shirone's mind, sweeping everything away.
A cold, piercing sound, as if glass was being cut, erupted.
Then, a perfect halo, with no margin of error, was born before Shirone's eyes.
The speed of light revolving along the halo's rail was literally the speed of light.
Although it had come out in a Deviate Type, the Spirit Zone was still the mind of a mage.
With such a thing spinning in his mind, his thoughts were paralyzed.
In short, Shirone had manifested the concept of the Immortal Function in the real world.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Shirone! From now on, I will engrave the archangel's unique omniscience on Shirone's halo! You must not let go of Indestructible Vajra. You have to endure to survive!
A red flash erupted from the front and crashed into the center of the halo.
As the red ripples spread, a magic circle of the simplest operations that distinguish the difference between 1 and 0 was born.
From there, the equations gradually grew more complex.
Colorful flashes of light, flying from unknown sources, collided with the halo like a shower of lightning, engraving the magic circle.
Numerous magic circles interlocked like gears and began to spin.
The sight of the magic circles rotating in different sizes, speeds, and directions resembled the mechanisms of a clock.
Shirone's mind was on the verge of exploding.
The first gear turned several other gears, which in turn rotated hundreds of gears.
The scale of the computation kept growing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: At some point, Shirone gave up on trying to calculate.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He couldn't comprehend the meaning embedded in the halo.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How can he understand what concept the 170,000 computational circuits and 4,800 magic circles are trying to reveal?
Ughhhh!
Nosebleeds flowed.
He gritted his teeth and held on, but the equations, amounting to a billion lines, were endlessly scrolling upwards.
Calculating this was a task that transcended human limitations.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Shirone! Don't try to understand! I'm comprehending it! Accept it through the circuit of insight!

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone realized Ikael's intentions.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There was no need to do any calculations.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The idea was to simplify complex concepts into truths and stamp them directly onto Shirone's brain.
When the number of magic circles engraved in the halo surpassed 40,000, Shirone could experience the realm of the divine.
It was nothing other than the speed of light computation.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: However, the fact that it took so long meant that the concepts contained in the light were beyond human capacity.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He still doesn't know what it is, but it was definitely something bigger than he could imagine.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - I can't do this. Not anymore….
Cracks began to appear in the Indestructible Vajra.
It was natural since humans were forcibly accepting the omniscience contained in the beings of a higher dimension.
This was the third hurdle that Ikael had spoken of.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: -We're almost there, Shirone! Just hold on a little longer...!
Shirone's backlash began to affect Ikael.
As the computational progress exceeded 90%, the magic circles automatically moved toward completion.
Shirone's mind was oversaturated.
It was as if a bomb someone had planted in his head was about to explode.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He could feel countless cracks forming in the Indestructible Vajra.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His mind was breaking.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In other words, I was going crazy.
Indeed, Shirone's mind was heading towards severe destruction.
Ikael looked at it with sorrow.
Even if the magic circle were completed, he wouldn't be able to withstand it.
Once the information volume reached 100%, the Indestructible Vajra would explode.
At that moment, a special change occurred in Shirone's mind.
The Indestructible Vajra was shattered into countless pieces beyond cracks.
If this was Shirone's current state of mind...
Even Ikael felt goosebumps at the thought.
But the results were different from what she expected.
Even as the durability of the Indestructible Vajra converged to zero, the shape of the mind did not change at all.
If the Indestructible Vajra was compared to a steel ball holding water, Shirone's current state was the process of the water freezing.
When the water starts to freeze, the steel ball breaks.
But what if it's a rubber ball? The size of the ball simply increases with the volume of ice that has increased.
Thus, Shirone pulverized the durability down to the level of particles, adding flexibility.
Softness overcomes hardness.
Shirone's steel ball had shattered, but the form of the ice inside remained unchanged.
Ikael's heart swelled with warmth.
Was this the power of a human? Even though his mind had been turned to dust, and even though he must have been in tremendous mental agony, Shirone maintained his mind until the very end.
That willpower evolved Shirone's mind to the next level.
This was the evolved form of Indestructible Vajra, the state of Indestructible Diamond.
The frame was shattered. Only the contents remained.
Since there was nothing left to destroy, Shirone could remain unshaken in any situation.
If Indestructible Vajra is the ultimate endurance, then Indestructible Diamond without a frame is the ultimate flexibility that humans pursue.
The density of information embedded in the halo surpassed 95%.
It was an enormous amount of information.
However, the Indestructible Vajra grew in size as much as the amount of swelled.
Then, it tightened again, encapsulating the angel's information.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: - Congratulations, Shirone.
Ikael offered unreserved praise.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Can a human being go from one extreme to another?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone had simultaneously acquired strength and flexibility.
It was an undeniable leap.
Shirone, buried in the angel's information, couldn't think of anything.
He just focused on enduring and realized that things had gone easier than before.
Only when the angel's magic circle was completed did he finally regain consciousness.
A halo of dozens of magic circles rotating at different speeds came into view.
There were probably hundreds of times as many magic circles operating inside.
It was a truly beautiful magic circle.
The halo that Ikael cast had seamlessly transferred to Shirone's experience.
Although he could not understand the principle, he could stamp out the completed concept like a seal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: - I did it, Ikael….
With those words, Shirone closed his eyes.
As his consciousness faded away, the world became dark.
Shirone winced at the intense light.
When he opened his eyes, he saw Ikael looking down at him with a worried expression.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Are you okay, Shirone? How are you feeling?
Shirone sat up.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For some reason, he felt a little embarrassed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He has already lost consciousness twice since meeting Ikael.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Associating with a higher-dimensional being was quite exhausting, he thought.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How long was I unconscious this time?

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: A bit longer. About 20 minutes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes? Why…?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Surely, Ikael could have woken him up much earlier.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: You were in shock, Shirone. Even if I forced you awake, you wouldn't be able to fight in top condition. Especially since using the angel's magic circle will require all your mental strength.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikael was right, but the fact that he was delaying things was still concerning.

blocks.speaker: Ikael
blocks.content: Don't worry. Shirone's mental power has become stronger since this incident. Plus, you've fully recovered, so you'll be able to reach the destination faster than before.
Shirone observed the changes within him.
His body was reacting much more powerfully than when he had reached the state of Indestructible Vajra.
As his mind was drawn several times deeper than before, Shirone regained his confidence.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If I go at full speed, I can make up for lost time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I wonder how Rian and Canis are doing?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: By his estimation, they should have arrived or been close to arriving.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That meant there was still a chance to catch up.
